text:
C. Change of Ownership - Mergers 

The merger of a provider corporation into another corporation constitutes a change of 
ownership. For information on specific procedures, refer to Pub. 100-07, State Operations 
Manual, chapter 2, section 2202.17. 

10.12 - Change of Ownership Relationship to Episodes Under PPS 
(Rev. 139, Issued: 02-16-11, Effective: 01-01-11, Implementation: 03-10-11)
